flashcards.definition: The long-run average of a random variable; for discrete X: E(X) = Σ xᵢ · P(xᵢ).
E(aX + b) = aE(X) + b; E(X + Y) = E(X) + E(Y) regardless of independence.
Var(X) = E(X²) − [E(X)]²; measures spread around the mean.
A game where the expected value of winnings is zero — neither side has an advantage on average.
In decision analysis, the weighted average of possible payoffs, used to compare alternatives.
